zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏多，关键均线支撑稳固
zh.content:
当前以太坊价格徘徊于2393.73美元附近，日内波动幅度有限，呈现窄幅震荡格局。结合SMA(20)在2388美元附近的支撑位置，短期均线提供一定下行缓冲，整体市场倾向于偏多，但缺乏明显突破动力。价格在2401美元上方承压，形成短线阻力区间。  

MACD指标显示多头动能尚存，但信号线数据缺失，需要关注后续交叉情况以确认趋势强弱。虽然RSI未提供具体值，但从价格波动和均线位置来看，市场仍处于中性偏多区间，短期超买风险有限。投资者应关注动能指标的进一步明朗化，以捕捉潜在反弹信号。  

支撑位方面，短线关注2388美元SMA支撑和2391美元近期低点，跌破可能触发进一步回调。阻力位集中在2401-2405美元区间，若价格突破该水平，将有望向上测试2410美元甚至更高。波动区间相对紧凑，适合逢低短线布局或区间高抛低吸策略。  

综合来看，以太坊短期维持震荡偏多态势，短线可考虑在支撑附近建仓，止损设置在2375美元以下，目标关注2405-2410美元区间。建议结合成交量和动能指标确认突破方向，避免追涨杀跌，保持稳健操作策略。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum has been consolidating near the $2390–$2400 range, reflecting a period of market indecision. The price recently peaked at $2401.68 before retracing to $2393.73, indicating short-term resistance around the $2400 level. The market is showing a slight bearish bias, as the latest 24-hour change is negative, though minimal at -0.14%. The narrow daily range suggests low volatility, implying that traders may be waiting for external catalysts or macroeconomic cues to drive the next directional move.  

The MACD reading of 16.726 signals ongoing bullish momentum, though the absence of the signal line prevents a full crossover analysis. Price trading slightly above the 20-period SMA of $2388 reinforces that the short-term trend remains upward-biased, despite minor retracements. Without RSI data, momentum confirmation is incomplete, but the combination of SMA support and a positive MACD indicates that bulls are still maintaining some control.  

Key support is clearly identified at $2388, corresponding with the SMA, while resistance remains firm near $2401–$2405. A sustained breakout above $2405 could trigger a new short-term rally toward $2420, while a failure to hold $2388 may expose ETH to $2370–$2365 downside. Traders should watch for volume surges, as they often validate breakout attempts and signal commitment from larger market participants.  

For short-term traders, a cautious approach is advisable. Long positions could be considered on dips near $2388 with tight stop losses just below, while aggressive traders might enter on a confirmed breakout above $2405. Given the current consolidation, range trading strategies may also be effective, capitalizing on minor oscillations between the identified support and resistance. Patience is crucial, as confirmation of trend continuation or reversal will guide higher-confidence entries.
